title: kyllinga polyphylla var. elata
intro: Kyllinga polyphylla var. elata, also known as Kyllinga, is a type of grassy plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. Kyllinga is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. In traditional herbal preparations, Kyllinga is often made into a tea or infusions, or used in combination with other herbs to create tonics and remedies.
